name: SuggestionBox
author: Taako
description: A Red DiscordBot cog for community suggestions with persistent arrow voting buttons, optional discussion threads, staff review states, comments, review logs, and CSV exports.
install_msg: suggestionbox loaded. Use `[p]suggestionbox setup [#suggestions] [#review-log]` to start collecting suggestions.
short: Community suggestions with voting, threads, review states, comments, and exports.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild suggestion configuration, suggestion text, Discord user IDs for authors, voters, and staff reviewers, message IDs, channel IDs, thread IDs, vote lists, statuses, staff notes, review reasons, and timestamps. CSV exports are generated on demand and sent directly to Discord.
